  Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" (refactor.rewrite.effect.wrapWithPipe)

=== Refactor Application Results ===

=== [R1] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/typeToEffectSchemaClass.ts ---
// refactor: 4:18-4:26
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export interface pipe(MyStruct) {
  anyProp: any
  bigintProp: bigint
  booleanProp: boolean
  neverProp: never
  nullProp: null
  numberProp: number
  stringProp: string
  undefinedProp: undefined
  unknownProp: unknown
  voidProp: void
  arrayTypeProp: Array<string>
  arrayProp: Array<string>
  dateProp: Date
  trueProp: true
  falseProp: false
  literalProp: "hello"
  numericLiteralProp: 42
  unionProp: string | boolean
  intersectionProp: { a: string } & { b: number }
  keyofProp: keyof { a: string; b: boolean }
  recordProp: Record<string, number>
  inlineStruct: { a: string; b: number }
  otherReference: MyUnion
  otherWithArguments: MyType<string, boolean>
  optionalProp?: string
  prop: string
}

type MyUnion = "A" | "B"
interface MyType<A, B> {
  _A: A
  _B: B
}


=== [R1] Refactor 1: "Generate Effect.Schema from type" ===

--- file:///.src/typeToEffectSchemaClass.ts ---
// refactor: 4:18-4:26
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export const MyStruct = Schema.Struct({
    anyProp: Schema.Any,
    bigintProp: Schema.BigInt,
    booleanProp: Schema.Boolean,
    neverProp: Schema.Never,
    nullProp: Schema.Null,
    numberProp: Schema.Number,
    stringProp: Schema.String,
    undefinedProp: Schema.Undefined,
    unknownProp: Schema.Unknown,
    voidProp: Schema.Void,
    arrayTypeProp: Schema.Array(Schema.String),
    arrayProp: Schema.Array(Schema.String),
    dateProp: Schema.Date,
    trueProp: Schema.Literal(true),
    falseProp: Schema.Literal(false),
    literalProp: Schema.Literal("hello"),
    numericLiteralProp: Schema.Literal(42),
    unionProp: Schema.Union([Schema.String, Schema.Boolean]),
    intersectionProp: Schema.Struct({
        a: Schema.String
    }).pipe(Schema.extend(Schema.Struct({
        b: Schema.Number
    }))),
    keyofProp: Schema.keyof(Schema.Struct({
        a: Schema.String,
        b: Schema.Boolean
    })),
    recordProp: Schema.Record(Schema.String, Schema.Number),
    inlineStruct: Schema.Struct({
        a: Schema.String,
        b: Schema.Number
    }),
    otherReference: MyUnion,
    otherWithArguments: undefined /* Not supported conversion: MyType<string, boolean> */,
    optionalProp: Schema.optional(Schema.String),
    prop: Schema.String
});

export interface MyStruct {
  anyProp: any
  bigintProp: bigint
  booleanProp: boolean
  neverProp: never
  nullProp: null
  numberProp: number
  stringProp: string
  undefinedProp: undefined
  unknownProp: unknown
  voidProp: void
  arrayTypeProp: Array<string>
  arrayProp: Array<string>
  dateProp: Date
  trueProp: true
  falseProp: false
  literalProp: "hello"
  numericLiteralProp: 42
  unionProp: string | boolean
  intersectionProp: { a: string } & { b: number }
  keyofProp: keyof { a: string; b: boolean }
  recordProp: Record<string, number>
  inlineStruct: { a: string; b: number }
  otherReference: MyUnion
  otherWithArguments: MyType<string, boolean>
  optionalProp?: string
  prop: string
}

type MyUnion = "A" | "B"
interface MyType<A, B> {
  _A: A
  _B: B
}


=== [R1] Refactor 2: "Generate Schema.Class from type" ===

--- file:///.src/typeToEffectSchemaClass.ts ---
// refactor: 4:18-4:26
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export class MyStruct extends Schema.Class<MyStruct>("MyStruct")({
    anyProp: Schema.Any,
    bigintProp: Schema.BigInt,
    booleanProp: Schema.Boolean,
    neverProp: Schema.Never,
    nullProp: Schema.Null,
    numberProp: Schema.Number,
    stringProp: Schema.String,
    undefinedProp: Schema.Undefined,
    unknownProp: Schema.Unknown,
    voidProp: Schema.Void,
    arrayTypeProp: Schema.Array(Schema.String),
    arrayProp: Schema.Array(Schema.String),
    dateProp: Schema.Date,
    trueProp: Schema.Literal(true),
    falseProp: Schema.Literal(false),
    literalProp: Schema.Literal("hello"),
    numericLiteralProp: Schema.Literal(42),
    unionProp: Schema.Union([Schema.String, Schema.Boolean]),
    intersectionProp: Schema.Struct({
        a: Schema.String
    }).pipe(Schema.extend(Schema.Struct({
        b: Schema.Number
    }))),
    keyofProp: Schema.keyof(Schema.Struct({
        a: Schema.String,
        b: Schema.Boolean
    })),
    recordProp: Schema.Record(Schema.String, Schema.Number),
    inlineStruct: Schema.Struct({
        a: Schema.String,
        b: Schema.Number
    }),
    otherReference: MyUnion,
    otherWithArguments: undefined /* Not supported conversion: MyType<string, boolean> */,
    optionalProp: Schema.optional(Schema.String),
    prop: Schema.String
}) {}

export interface MyStruct {
  anyProp: any
  bigintProp: bigint
  booleanProp: boolean
  neverProp: never
  nullProp: null
  numberProp: number
  stringProp: string
  undefinedProp: undefined
  unknownProp: unknown
  voidProp: void
  arrayTypeProp: Array<string>
  arrayProp: Array<string>
  dateProp: Date
  trueProp: true
  falseProp: false
  literalProp: "hello"
  numericLiteralProp: 42
  unionProp: string | boolean
  intersectionProp: { a: string } & { b: number }
  keyofProp: keyof { a: string; b: boolean }
  recordProp: Record<string, number>
  inlineStruct: { a: string; b: number }
  otherReference: MyUnion
  otherWithArguments: MyType<string, boolean>
  optionalProp?: string
  prop: string
}

type MyUnion = "A" | "B"
interface MyType<A, B> {
  _A: A
  _B: B
}


=== [R1] Refactor 3: "Refactor to Schema (Recursive Structural)" ===

--- file:///.src/typeToEffectSchemaClass.ts ---
// refactor: 4:18-4:26
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export class MyStruct extends Schema.Class<MyStruct>("MyStruct")({
    anyProp: Schema.Any,
    bigintProp: Schema.BigInt,
    booleanProp: Schema.Boolean,
    neverProp: Schema.Never,
    nullProp: Schema.Null,
    numberProp: Schema.Number,
    stringProp: Schema.String,
    undefinedProp: Schema.Undefined,
    unknownProp: Schema.Unknown,
    voidProp: Schema.Void,
    arrayTypeProp: Schema.mutable(Schema.Array(Schema.String)),
    arrayProp: Schema.mutable(Schema.Array(Schema.String)),
    dateProp: Schema.Date,
    trueProp: Schema.Literal(true),
    falseProp: Schema.Literal(false),
    literalProp: Schema.Literal("hello"),
    numericLiteralProp: Schema.Literal(42),
    unionProp: Schema.Union([Schema.String, Schema.Literal(false), Schema.Literal(true)]),
    intersectionProp: Schema.Struct({
        a: Schema.String
    }).pipe(Schema.extend(Schema.Struct({
        b: Schema.Number
    }))),
    keyofProp: Schema.Union([Schema.Literal("a"), Schema.Literal("b")]),
    recordProp: Schema.StructWithRest(Schema.Struct({}), [Schema.Record(Schema.String, Schema.Number)]),
    inlineStruct: Schema.Struct({
        a: Schema.String,
        b: Schema.Number
    }),
    otherReference: Schema.Union([Schema.Literal("A"), Schema.Literal("B")]),
    otherWithArguments: MyType,
    optionalProp: Schema.optional(Schema.Union([Schema.Undefined, Schema.String])),
    prop: Schema.String
}) {}

class MyType extends Schema.Class<MyType>("MyType")({
    _A: Schema.String,
    _B: Schema.Boolean
}) {}

export interface MyStruct {
  anyProp: any
  bigintProp: bigint
  booleanProp: boolean
  neverProp: never
  nullProp: null
  numberProp: number
  stringProp: string
  undefinedProp: undefined
  unknownProp: unknown
  voidProp: void
  arrayTypeProp: Array<string>
  arrayProp: Array<string>
  dateProp: Date
  trueProp: true
  falseProp: false
  literalProp: "hello"
  numericLiteralProp: 42
  unionProp: string | boolean
  intersectionProp: { a: string } & { b: number }
  keyofProp: keyof { a: string; b: boolean }
  recordProp: Record<string, number>
  inlineStruct: { a: string; b: number }
  otherReference: MyUnion
  otherWithArguments: MyType<string, boolean>
  optionalProp?: string
  prop: string
}

type MyUnion = "A" | "B"
interface MyType<A, B> {
  _A: A
  _B: B
}
